title: Small Knife
description: This mod is designed for players who love Japanese-themed katanas, and it's also a new type of weapon, not just a collection of resources.
body:
## SMALL KNIFE

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kWchl1-xRdo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



![A knife in a frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37f0a822585bd865f36e506670c88299042fb100_0.webp)

## History of creation mod
_My very first mod for the minecraft game is called the little knife and it is still available on version 1.20.1._

_I don't have a team and I work alone, but I'm ready to delight you with new cool mods. This mod was created to show you that I'm here, I'm alive and ready to take on this difficult (in my opinion) job again._

_I know that the shape of this sword itself didn't work out very well, but in my next mods I'll just try to do better and better, but I'm just starting to master the modding program. **I HOPE YOU LIKE IT.  I DID IT WITH LOVE**._

## Supported platforms

_So far, for this mod, I have made support for only one version 1.20.1 Fabric, but in the near future I will supplement this mod with new versions as well, I promise you_

## Developers

_The developer of this mod is only one person, and that's me, NIGHTBREZEE, and I'll be glad if you support me with your jumps of my mod. I'm sorry that I've been trying to ask you to download my mod for some time._


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Thank you to everyone who downloaded this mod, I love you**

</details>
